category_sources: Official PyPy homepage describes PyPy as a fast, compliant alternative implementation of Python.
source_facts.description says pypy3.10 is an implementation of Python 3 in Python.
display_name_sources: Official PyPy blog describes the py3.10 branch for the Python 3.10 interpreter.
docs_sources: Official PyPy homepage links to documentation at doc.pypy.org.
repo_sources: Official PyPy blog states the canonical repo and issue tracker moved to https://github.com/pypy/pypy.
tags_sources: Official PyPy blog mentions the py3.10 interpreter branch.
